name.description:
Name of the package.

*Added in Ganzua NEXT:* previously, the package name was implicit.
name.title: Name

SourceDirect.description: The package is sourced from a specific URL or path, e.g. a Git repo or workspace path.

direct.description: URL or path to the package (directory or archive).
direct.title: Direct

subdirectory.description: Only allowed if the source points to an archive file.
subdirectory.title: Subdirectory

SourceDirect.title: SourceDirect

SourceRegistry.description: The package is sourced from a third party registry.

registry.description: URL or path to the registry.
registry.title: Registry

SourceRegistry.title: SourceRegistry

packages.description:
All packages in the lockfile.

In case of split versions, there can be multiple entries with the same package name.

*Changed in Ganzua NEXT:* `packages` is now a list.
Previously, it was a `name → LockedPackage` table.
packages.title: Packages
